start.title: SOC Command Bridge
start.text: Four network segments are active. Time runs continuously while you pivot. Actions do not consume timer budget: investigate as much as possible before countdown ends.

final_assess.title: Full Kill-Chain Review
final_assess.text: Hidden kill-chain slots open as you collect malware/IOC evidence from machines. Decide whether to execute coordinated containment.

win_node.title: Containment Complete
win_node.text: You mapped all four networks, protected critical files from deletion, and synchronized containment across domain, ICS, UAV, and public services.

end_node.title: Exercise Terminated
end_node.text: The rushed action caused cascading disruption before evidence collection was complete.
